MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-15-2013 IN 206, DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT PACE MANAGEMENT, LLC'S NOTICE OF THE PARTIES' JOINT MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. MICHAEL KECK SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR STEPHEN CORNET, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. VIVIAN COUNTRYMAN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT PACE MANAGEMENT, LLC. MARIA LAMPASONA APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT RENAISSANCE HOTEL MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC. DAVID POLL APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-DEFENDANT MARCO A. HERRERA DBA GLOBAL SOLUTIONS. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/3/13 IS CONTINUED TO 4/14/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE BASE ON SCHEDULE CONFLICTS OF COUNSEL. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
